title: BetterTotemHighlight
description: Shows a color box around your totems in your inventory.
body:
# Better Totem Highlight

## highlights totems in inventory

### Features
- customizable color
- ability to bind gui 

### Dependencies
- [mod menu](https://modrinth.com/mod/modmenu)
- [YetAnotherConfigLib (YACL)](https://modrinth.com/mod/yacl) (version 3.8.1+)

> ### If you like my work, give it a ❤ it helps

![yellow](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/xh0xITjC/images/34aacd671474e57ffe59f002a9c73b16ea9b946a.png)

![gui](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/xh0xITjC/images/4f420479bb12bbde5bf4361a5764f9fdd1a8e266_350.webp)
